synopsis: While the first volume starts readers in the midst of the Jedi purge, the second volume of the Kanan comic series stretches farther back to Caleb Dume’s first mission as a padawan under Master Depa Billaba. They fight in the Battle of Mygeeto and encounter the one and only leader of the droid army, General Grievous himself.
title: Kanan Vol. 2: First Blood
